reviews.review_msg: He just reads the notes for lectures, which are just extracts of the textbook copied verbatim, but without context. Filled notes & tutorial solutions are not posted, forcing attendance to see the answers. The midterm was a huge difficulty spike, but the final was fair. Make sure you can do all tutorial & assignment problems that are doable by hand.

Worst class I've ever taken. Professor Tsai would read/copy everything straight from the textbook and oftentimes was confused about his own notes. It can be difficult to follow lectures as he goes over everything very fast and it can be hard to read his handwriting. The content wasn't too bad, but the way it was explained made it 10x more confusing
